270 WT_NUM WT_NUM 26A Weight Number CHAR 3 This column documents the patient's weight (in pounds) at admission. If measurement is X.1-X.4 round down, X.5 or greater round up
271 DSCHRG_ALIVE_IND DSCHRG_ALIVE_IND 44C Discharged Alive CHAR 1 This column documents whether the patient was discharged alive. 0 - No
1 - Yes
272 DSCHRG_DSTNTN_CD DSCHRG_DSTNTN_CD 44D Discharge Destination Code CHAR 2 This column documents the patient's discharge
